title: Bombing of Telos IV
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Battle |prev=[[Battle of Yag'Dhul (Jedi Civil War)|Battle of Yag'Dhul]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |conc= |next=[[Battle of Iridonia (Jedi Civil War)|Battle of Iridonia]] |image= |name=Bombing of Telos IV |conflict=[[Jedi Civil War]] ([[Old Sith Wars]]) |date=[[3958 BBY]]''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' |place=[[Telos IV]] |result=*Sith victory *Devastation of Telosian ecosystem |side1=[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |side2=[[Darth Revan's Sith Empire]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2=*[[Darth Malak]] *[[Admiral of the Fleet/Legends|Admiral]] [[Saul Karath]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] soldiers *[[Telos Security Force]] |forces2=*Sith bombers *[[Leviathan (Interdictor-class cruiser)|''Leviathan'']] *Various other Sith Capital ships |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*Heavy |casual2= |casual3= |casual4= |civilian=*Millions of Telosian citizens *[[Morgana Onasi]] }} {{Quote|Telos…Saul led the Sith fleet there and demanded its surrender. The planet refused and Saul proceeded to devastate its entire surface. Millions died.|Carth Onasi|''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''}} The '''Bombing of Telos IV''' was one of the first battles of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Meant by [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]] to be conquered, the civilian target was attacked without warning or provocation by former [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Saul Karath]] under [[Darth Malak|Malak's]] direct order, marking the beginning of the conflict. ==The attack== To prove his loyalty to the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith]], Republic defector Saul Karath, captain of the [[Leviathan (Interdictor-class cruiser)|''Leviathan'']], ex-hero of the [[Mandalorian Wars]], and later commander of the entire Sith fleet, bombed [[Telos IV]] using his codes to bypass their scanners. Eluding Republic defense systems, Sith bombers were able to infiltrate into the Republic docks before any warning could be raised. In moments, half the Republic fleet docked at Telos was destroyed. This was only the vanguard of Karath's attack, and he soon arrived with the bulk of his fleet, the ''Leviathan'' at its head. The resulting attack was devastating. While some were able to escape on in-system shuttles,''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'': [[Aaida]] in the [[Refugee Sector]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. millions were killed, and more died soon after due to medical supply shortages. A nearby Republic task force in which [[Carth Onasi]] was stationed arrived in the system shortly after, but by then it was too late. They were left to pick up the witnesses aboard the drifting vessels Karath and Malak let survive so that their testimony would intimidate those who would stand against the Sith Empire. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|Everyone knows it was Malak who gave the order to attack your people, Carth. You can't blame Revan for that.|[[Canderous Ordo]] to Carth Onasi|}} The attack left Telos's environment devastated. The atmosphere degraded into acidic vapor and all plant and animal life on the surface was obliterated. After the end of the Jedi Civil War, the Republic decided to use Telos for a test to see if a restoration effort could be mounted on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] to reclaim the other war-torn planets, and financed the [[Telosian Restoration Project]] and construction of [[Citadel Station]] to purify the atmosphere and rebuild the ecosystem. Republic soldier [[Carth Onasi]] was one of many left emotionally scarred by the attack. His wife dead and [[Dustil Onasi|son]] missing, Carth swore revenge on Karath, who had been not only a hero to him, but his personal mentor. He came to fulfill this vow [[3956 BBY|three years later]] on the bridge of the ''Leviathan''. In [[3951 BBY]], [[Kreia]] predicted of Telos that "complacent and peaceful, it would forget the time that Saul Karath orbited it and brought fire to its skies". ==Behind the scenes== In ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', a conversation between [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Atris]] and Kreia marks Revan instead of Malak as the one who gave the order to destroy Telos. {{Quote|It was always intended for the Jedi to retreat to Telos should Dantooine be attacked—taking all their lore with them. We could not allow the tragedy at Ossus to happen again.''"
"''Such an act marked Telos for destruction. It is why the Sith came here, though the fleet commanders did not know why. It is why Revan ordered its destruction to mark the beginning of the Jedi Civil War. It was a message that there would be no place for the Jedi to retreat, to hide.|Jedi Masters Atris and Kreia (cut content)|''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''}} This content may have been cut to avoid confusion. Regardless of whether Kreia was guessing as to whether the order came from Revan himself or not, it somewhat concerns Revan's romance with Carth for the non-canon female gender option, as it would make her responsible for the destruction of his homeworld and all that came of it. ===Continuity=== The battle has been inconsistently dated in various sources. Carth's dialogue from ''Knights of the Old Republic'' places the battle four years prior in [[3960 BBY]]—before the beginning of the [[Jedi Civil War]] and the defection of Saul Karath. The timeline within the ''Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide'' later retconned that dating by placing the battle at 3958 BBY. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{Mo}} *[[Jedi — The Dark Side 2|''Jedi — The Dark Side'' 2]] {{Mo}} ==Sources== *{{LucasArts|url=games/swkotor_sithlords/planets.html|text=Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords - Planets}} *''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{DB|character|carthonasi|Onasi, Carth}} *[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Edge of the Empire'' Core Rulebook]] *[[Star Wars: Age of Rebellion Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Age of Rebellion'' Core Rulebook]] {{Imo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{JediCivilWarNav}} {{Interlang |es=Bombardeo de Telos IV }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Telos IV, Bombing of}} [[Category:Battles of Telos IV]] [[Category:Battles of the Jedi Civil War]] [[Category:Genocides and massacres]] [[Category:Orbital bombardments]]
